hypothesis_closed: OACI conditional-domain leakage minimization as a downstream-benefit (worst-domain DG) mechanism

C10b.identity: 216/216 (0 argmax flips; S0_current reproduces C8 K2 exactly)

decision: stop investing in conditional-domain leakage control as a downstream-benefit mechanism; not a selector problem (case A) and not a selection-split problem (case B)

source-audit / selection-split redesign for OACI (case B ruled out)
